svg.aria-label: 5F6-A · eyelet board layout — redrawn board layout diagram
svg.text: Redrawn from Fender 'Bassman' Model 5F6-A layout drawing (I-EG), page 1 — not a trace
Note: the 6.3 V heater twisted pair always routes on the top layer and never joins another run — its crossings are not hop-overs.
